description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Snowballs: CI / CD that runs on push to core4, feature/* branches and on pull requests to core4, with specific path filters. The workflow should also trigger on completion of the NeL: CI / CD workflow. It should have two jobs: one for setting reusable strings and another for building, testing, and packaging the project on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, using CMake and CPack.
